## Source: amazon-inspector (c54126529b9da791496e58ec744f6b7fe4fe769258480802eb5a3dcbc017d0d8)
The package sketch-measure was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (72239598d7cabaac4417bd7b259f8db46cb9b1ed565d4feba3985cff2be047bc)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'sketch-measure' @ 99.9.9 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
